import sys
sys.path.insert(0, '/opt/triposr')

import torch
from tsr.system import TSR

# Load model
model = TSR.from_pretrained(
    "/models/triposr",
    config_name="config.yaml",
    weight_name="model.ckpt",
)
model.renderer.set_chunk_size(131072)
device = 'cuda:0'
model.to(device)

# Check renderer API
print("Renderer type:", type(model.renderer))
print("Renderer methods:", [m for m in dir(model.renderer) if not m.startswith('_')])

# Check model.render signature
import inspect
print("\nmodel.render signature:", inspect.signature(model.render))

# Try rendering with default method
from PIL import Image
import os

data_dir = os.environ.get('RAB_DATA_DIR', '/data')
train_dir = os.path.join(data_dir, 'train')
objects = sorted(os.listdir(train_dir))
obj = objects[0]

input_path = os.path.join(train_dir, obj, 'input.png')
img = Image.open(input_path)
if img.mode == 'RGBA':
    background = Image.new('RGB', img.size, (255, 255, 255))
    background.paste(img, mask=img.split()[3])
    img_rgb = background
else:
    img_rgb = img.convert('RGB')

print(f"\nProcessing {obj}, image size: {img_rgb.size}")

with torch.no_grad():
    scene_codes = model([img_rgb], device=device)

print(f"Scene codes type: {type(scene_codes)}")
print(f"Scene codes shape: {scene_codes.shape if hasattr(scene_codes, 'shape') else 'N/A'}")

# Try default render
with torch.no_grad():
    frames = model.render(scene_codes, n_views=4, return_type='pil')

print(f"\nFrames type: {type(frames)}")
if isinstance(frames, list):
    print(f"Num frames: {len(frames)}")
    if frames:
        print(f"Frame type: {type(frames[0])}")
        if isinstance(frames[0], list):
            print(f"Inner list len: {len(frames[0])}")
            if frames[0]:
                print(f"Inner frame type: {type(frames[0][0])}")
                if hasattr(frames[0][0], 'size'):
                    print(f"Frame size: {frames[0][0].size}")
        elif hasattr(frames[0], 'size'):
            print(f"Frame size: {frames[0].size}")

# Check render signature more carefully
print("\n--- Checking render source ---")
try:
    src = inspect.getsource(model.render)
    print(src[:2000])
except:
    print("Could not get source")
